title: Values, Types, Coercion, and Equality · Behavior Workshop
summary: Normalize prices, quantities, identifiers, optional fields, and validity signals from a mixed service-data feed. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a value-normalization and validation pipeline while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish undefined, null, Boolean, Number, BigInt, String, Symbol, and object values by behavior and use.
Use typeof, Array.isArray, instanceof, and explicit predicates while accounting for their boundaries.
Predict implicit coercion and prefer explicit conversion at external data boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
